entity: Stephen Curry 2024-25 regular-season scoring rank (per-game leaders). Curry finishes the season around rank 18-20 with ~24 PPG; BBR 2024-25 leaders page lists him at 24.5 PPG.
notes: Pins the 2024-25 Regular-season scoring leaders query to include Curry (24.5 PPG). Ranks come from the rebuilt agg_league_leaders with BBR-style qualification (58-of-82 games or 1400-point floor, schedule-scaled); the row-presence assertion pins Curry in the leaderboard without locking to a single rank.
